channel.title: Galaxy of the Day
channel.description: RSS feed of the galaxy of the day.

item.title: Mighty Milky Way
item.description: Mighty Milky Way is a 2011 puzzle video game developed and published by WayForward Technologies for the Nintendo DSi's DSiWare service. It was the second title after Mighty Flip Champs! in the Mighty series from WayForward Technologies.
